blocks.content: A built-in Apex class that keeps Execution records in sync with their asynchronous Bulk API jobs.

When an Executable Action runs through the Bulk API, Salesforce processes the job asynchronously. The action returns before the job finishes, so the Execution does not yet know the job's final outcome. BulkJobStatusSyncer checks the status of these Bulk API jobs and writes the results back to the corresponding pushtopics__Execution__c record, keeping its status and statistics accurate.
Run BulkJobStatusSyncer on a Schedule. Create a Schedule, set BulkJobStatusSyncer as its Apex class, and configure the run frequency.
